roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT CONFIRMED THE FUTURE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 0-29-20 IN M11/DOP/
